authentication-service/src/main/java/dan.general_idea: Add import for the new ResetPasswordDTO class to support password reset functionality.
Update import path for UserService to reflect package restructuring from feignClients to feign_clients.
Add import for Spring's @Value annotation to inject configuration properties.
Inject the protected_endpoints_key configuration property into the controller.
Pass the protectedEndpointsKey to the getUserAuthentication method to support enhanced security checks.
Rename the email key service method from save to registrationKey for better semantic clarity.
Add a new endpoint to send a password reset key to a user's email.
Add a new endpoint to reset a user's password using a valid key.
Add Jakarta validation annotation to enforce email format on the email field.
Add Jakarta validation annotations to enforce non-blank and max length constraints on the username field.
authentication-service/src/main/java/dan.human_impl: @NotBlank(message = "Username must not be empty") @Size(max = 20, message = "Username cannot be more than 20 characters")

authentication-service/src/main/java/dan.general_idea: Add Jakarta validation annotation to enforce non-blank constraint on the password field.
Add Jakarta validation annotation to enforce non-blank constraint on the country field.
Add Jakarta validation annotation to enforce non-blank constraint on the city field.
Make RegistrationKeyDTO implement the EmailKeyDTO interface to enforce a common contract for email-based key DTOs.
Add explicit accessor methods required by the EmailKeyDTO interface, mapping to existing Lombok fields.
authentication-service/src/main/java/dan.human_impl: @Override public String email() { return email; } @Override public int key() { return key; }

authentication-service/src/main/java/dan.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the renaming of the feign client package from 'feignClients' to 'feign_clients'.
Inject a new configuration property 'protected_endpoints_key' to be used for secure communication.
Pass the injected key to the getUserAuthentication method to support the new security requirement.
Refactor the monolithic save method into a reusable sendKey helper and specific entry points for registration and password reset.
authentication-service/src/main/java/dan.human_impl: public void sendKey(String email, String message) { ... }

authentication-service/src/main/java/dan.general_idea: Introduce a new public method to handle password reset key generation and sending.
Introduce a new public method to handle registration key generation and sending.
Replace raw integer literals with underscore-separated numeric literals for improved readability.
Change the generated key type from Integer object to primitive int.
Add import for java.util.function.Function, likely in preparation for functional interface usage or cleanup.
Change the validator to support EmailKeyDTO instead of RegistrationKeyDTO to align with the new reset password feature.
Update the validation logic to cast to EmailKeyDTO and use record accessor methods instead of bean getters.

chats-service/src/main/java/danix/app/ch.general_idea: Inject Authorization header into sendMessage endpoint to enable user identity verification.
Pass the extracted token to the chat service layer for processing the text message.
Inject Authorization header into sendImage endpoint to enable user identity verification.
Pass the extracted token to the chat service layer for processing the image message.
Rename UserService to UsersService to align with updated Feign client naming conventions.
Add logic to check if the target user is blocked before creating a new chat.
chats-service/src/main/java/danix/app/ch.human_impl: if (usersService.isBlocked(userId, token)) { throw new ChatException("User has blocked you"); }

chats-service/src/main/java/danix/app/ch.general_idea: Add logic to check if the recipient is blocked before sending a message.
chats-service/src/main/java/danix/app/ch.human_impl: if (usersService.isBlocked(userId, token)) { throw new ChatException("User has blocked you"); }

chats-service/src/main/java/danix/app/ch.general_idea: Update method signatures to accept and propagate the authentication token for blocking checks.
chats-service/src/main/java/danix/app/ch.human_impl: public void sendTextMessage(long chatId, String text, String token) { sendMessage(chatId, text, Message.ContentType.TEXT, token); }

users-service/src/main/java/danix/app/us.general_idea: Expose the password reset endpoint publicly to allow unauthenticated access for password recovery.
users-service/src/main/java/danix/app/us.human_impl: Added "/user/password" to the list of permitAll() request matchers.

Add a new endpoint to retrieve user comments with pagination.
Rename the registration DTO class from RegistrationUserDTO to RegistrationDTO.
Update the registration confirmation endpoint path to use a sub-path structure.
Add a key parameter to the authentication endpoint for protected access.
Implement logic to validate the protected endpoint key in the authentication method.
Add a new endpoint to reset user passwords with key protection.
Refine the error message for empty comments to be more grammatically correct.
